description:
Fix Pagination Controls Display on News Pages

Investigate and resolve rendering issues causing pagination controls to display incorrectly on news pages and other paginated content areas.

Requirements:
- Identify the specific display problems with pagination controls (alignment, visibility, layout breakage, missing elements)
- Locate all news pages and other areas where pagination is used
- Ensure pagination controls render correctly across different screen sizes and devices
- Verify pagination functionality works properly (navigation between pages, current page indicator, disabled states for first/last pages)
- Check for CSS conflicts or JavaScript errors affecting pagination display
- Test with different data sets (few items, many items, edge cases like single page or empty results)
- Ensure consistent styling with the rest of the application

Edge cases to consider:
- Single page of results (pagination should hide or disable appropriately)
- Empty results or no data
- Very large page numbers
- Mobile and tablet viewports
